query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A black and white abstract image showing radial streaks of light and shadow emanating from a dark central point, with soft overlapping bands of varying gray tones creating a vortex-like pattern.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract black and white photograph with extreme intentional motion blur creating radial light streaks from a dark center, where all fine detail dissolves into soft bands of gray that lack any recognizable subject or texture, rendered with flat tonal separation and no discernible focal point.
